verses.text: Antiok khua pawlpi sungah kamsang pawlkhat leh sia pawlkhat om uh hi. Tuate pen Barnabas, Mi Vompa zong a kici Simon, Sairin khuami Lusias, gam ukpipa khutnuai-ah gam a uksawn Herod tawh a khangkhawm Manaen, leh Saul ahi uh hi
Amaute in an tangin Pasian bia-in a om laitakun Kha Siangtho in amaute kiangah, “Keima na a sem dingin ka sapsa ahih manin kei-a' dingin Barnabas leh Saul hong piakhia un,” a ci hi
Amaute in zong an tangin, a lu tung uhah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak khit uh ciangin a kuankhia sak uh hi.
Kha Siangtho' sawlna mah bangin Seleusia khua-ah paisuk uh a, tua khua panin teembaw tuangin Saipras tuikulhah a pai uh hi
Saipras tuikulh-a om Salamis khua a tun' uh ciangin Jew mite' kikhopna innte-ah Pasian thu a hilh uh hi. Tua a nasepna uhah a huh dingin Johan Marka zong amaute tawh a omkhawm hi
Tua tuikulh tung khempeuhah zin kawikawi-in Pafos khua a tun' uh ciangin mitphial a bawl, kamsang a kineih, Barjesuh min nei Jew mi khat a tuak uh hi
Tua mipa pen tua tuikulh a uksawn, a pil mahmah Sergius Paulus tawh a kithei mahmah mi khat ahi hi. Tua gam ukpa in Pasian' thu zanuam ahih manin Barnabas leh Saul a sam hi
Ahi zongin tua mitphial siampa Elymas (a Grik min) in Barnabas leh Saul na nial a, gam ukpa in Pasian' thu a up theihlohna dingin a na hanciam hi
Tua ciangin Saul (Paul zong a kicipa) Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin tua mipa limtakin en a
“Dawimangpa tawh a kibang mipa aw, thuhoih khempeuh nialin, gitlohna ngian tuamtuam na nei a, Topa' thuman pen zuau suahsak ding na hanciam tawntung hi
Tu-in Topa in nang hong su ding a, na mit taw-in tawlkhat sung khua na mu kei ding hi,” a cih khit phetin, meii vom in Elymas' mit tuamcip a, a khut lenin amah a paipih ding mi a zawt kawikawi hi
Gam ukpa in hih thupiang a muh ciang leh Topa thu a kigente a zak ciangin lamdangsa mahmahin Pasian a um hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Paul leh Barnabas in Pisidia gam Antiok khua-ah Thu Hilh

verses.text: Tua ciangin Pafos khua panin Paul leh a lawmte teembaw tuangin Pamfilia gam Perga khua a tung uh hi. Tua khua panin Johan Marka in amaute nusia-in Jerusalem khua-ah a ciahkik hi
Ahi zongin Perga khua panin amaute paisuak uh a, Pisidia gam Antiok khua a tung uh hi. Sabbath ni-in kikhopna inn-ah pai-in a tu uh hi

Kikhopna inn ukte in Moses Thukham Laibu sung leh kamsangte' laibute a sim khit uh ciangin amaute kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, mihonte tungah hanthotna kam na gennop uh leh thu nong gen ding uh ka deih uh hi,” a cisak uh hi
Tua ahih manin Paul hong ding a, a khut vanin thugen ding hong kipan a, “Israel mipihte leh hih lai-ah Pasian a bia Gentail mite aw, kathugen na ngai un

Hih Israel mite' biak Pasian in ko Israel mite' pu leh pate na na teel a, Egypt gamah pemta-in a om sungun minam lian khatin a na bawl hi. Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh Egypt gam panin amaute na paikhiatpih a
kum sawmli sung gamsungah amaute na ompih kenkon hi
Pasian in Kanaan gamsungah mi nam sagih a suksiat khit ciangin kum za li leh kum sawmnga sung bang ama mite a luahsak hi
“Tua khit ciangin kamsang Samuel hun ciangdong amaute' vai a hawm dingin ukpite a pia hi
Amaute in kumpi ding a nget uh ciangin Pasian in Benjamin minam sung pan Kish' tapa Saul, kum sawmli sung amaute' kumpi dingin a pia hi

Pasian in kumpi dingin Saul a zat nawnloh ciangin amaute' kumpi dingin David a semsak hi. Pasian in David' thu genin, ‘Ka sawl khempeuh a sem ding, ka deih bang mi khat, Jessi' tapa David ka mukhin hi,’ a cihsa thu ahi hi
Pasian in ama ciamsa bangin Israel mite a honkhia dingin hih David' suan sung pan Jesuh a bawl hi
Jesuh in nasep a kipat ma-in, a mawhna panun kisikin tui a kiphumna dingun Johan in Israel mi khempeuh tungah thu a hilh hi

Johan in ama nasep a zawh kuan ciangin mite kiangah, ‘Kei kua hi hong ci na hi uh hiam? Kei pen note' ngakpa ka hi kei hi. En un, kei nungah na ngakpa uh hong pai a, ama khedap khau a sutsak ding nangawnin ka kilawmzo nai kei hi,’ ci hi
“Abraham' suan ka behte leh Pasian a bia Gentail mi khempeuh aw, hih hotkhiatna thu pen eite-a' dingin Pasian in a hong puak ahi hi

Jerusalem khua-a a teng mite leh a makaite un Jesuh pen Honpa ahih lamtak na theilo uh a, Sabbath nisimin a kisim niloh kamsangte' thu zong na tello uh hi. Amaute in Jesuh na mawhsak uh ahih manin kamsangte' thugente a manin hong tung hi
Amaute in Jesuh in sihna a thuakna dingin thukhenna a ngahna ding thu mu zolo napi uh, Pilat in thahna ding thu a piakna dingin na ngen teitei uh hi
Lai Siangtho in Jesuh' thu a gen bang teekteekin a bawlkhit uh ciangin singlamteh tung panin lakhia sukin han sungah a koih uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in sihna panin amah hingkik sak a
Galilee gam leh Jerusalem khua kikalah amah tawh khual a zinzin khawm ngei mite tungah tam veipi a mun tuamtuamah na kilang hi

Kote pen note kiangah Lungdamna Thu a puak dingin hih lai-ah a hong om ka hi uh hi. Tua thu in: Pasian in i pu i pate tungah a ciam thu pen Jesuh a hin'kik sakna tawh, Israel' suan ahi eite leh midang khempeuh-a' dingin tu-in a hong tungsak ahi hi. Late a lian nihna sungah, ‘Nang pen ka Tapa na hi a, tuni-in nangma Pa ka suak hi,’ a cihna thu hong tungsak hi

Muatna a thuakkik ngei nawnlo dingin sihna panin amah a hin'kiksakna tawh kisai-in Pasian in a thugenna-ah, ‘David tungah ka ciamsa mah bangin note tungah thupha siangtho kong pia takpi ding hi,’ ci hi
Tua mah bangin Late a gelhpa in zong, ‘Nang tungah a hong thuman na nasempa muatna na thuaksak kei ding hi,’ a ci hi
David in ama hun lai-in Pasian' deihna bangin na sem a, a sih ciangin a pu a pate gei mahah kisialin muatna a thuak hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in sihna panin a hin'kiksak Jesuh in muatna thuaklo hi
Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, hih Jesuh hangin mawhmaisakna thu note tungah hong kihilh ahihna teltakin na theih ding uh ahi hi
Tua thamlohin Jesuh a um mite khempeuh pen Moses Thukham in a suahtaksak zawhloh mawhna khempeuh panin a suakta ahihna thu na theih ding uh ahi hi

Tua ahih manin kamsangte in, ‘Pasian a thusimlo mite aw, lamdangsa lua-in na si ding uh hi. Na nuntak sungun note lakah ka sepkhiat ding uh thu pen mi khatpeuh in hong gen hi leh na up hetloh ding uh thu ahi hi,’ ci-in a gen uh thute, note tungah hong pian' khaklohna dingin kidawm un,” a ci hi
Kikhopna inn panin Paul leh Barnabas a ciahding uh ciangin, Sabbath ni kik ciangin hih thute mah hong gen lai un, ci-in mite in a vaikhak uh hi

Kikhopna inn panin a ciahkhiat uh ciangin Jew mi tampite leh Jew biakna a zui Gentail mi tampite in Paul leh Barnabas zui uh a, amaute gel in zong tua mite hanthawnin, Pasian' hehpihna suangin kiptakin a omna dingun a gen uh hi
A Sabbath ni kik ciangin Pasian' thu a ngai dingin a khuazang phialun hong kikhawm uh hi
Jew mite in mi tampi tak a hong kikhawm a muh uh ciangin Paul leh Barnabas haza uh ahih manin Paul' thugente a manlopi hi, ci-in Paul a gensia uh hi

Tua ciangin Paul leh Barnabas in hangtakin thu gen uh a, “No Jew mite tungah Pasian' thu kong gen masak ding mah uh ahi hi. Ahi zongin note in Pasian' thu nialin, nuntak tawntungna a ngah dingin kilawmzo kisalo na hih manun, note kiang panin paikhia-in Gentail mite kiangah ka pai ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kote kiangah thu hong pia khinzo a, ‘Leitung mi khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngahtheihna dingin Gentail mite' khuavak ahi dingin ka hong koih hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi
Gentail mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin lungdam mahmah uh a, Pasian' thu hoih mahmah hi, ci-in a phat uh hi. Nuntak tawntungna a ngah dingin Pasian in a teelsa mite in Pasian' thu hong um uh hi
Tua gam kiim khempeuhah Topa' thu kizel hi
Ahi zongin Jew mite in tua khuasung uliante leh Gentail mi numei citheite holhthawh uh a, Paul leh Barnabas bawlsiat ding kipanin, tua gam panin a taikhia sak uh hi
Sawltakte in zong a khe uha leivui bangte sin'khiat sanin Ikonium khua-ah a pai uh hi
Antiok khua-a om thu um mite ahih leh Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin lungdam mahmahin a om uh hi.
